title: cyanus reuterianus
intro: Cyanus reuterianus, also known as the Cornflower, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and reduce the risk of infection. The health benefits of Cyanus reuterianus include its ability to support eye health, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for insomnia and other sleep disorders. Herbal preparations of Cyanus reuterianus can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to calm the nervous system and promote a restful night's sleep.
